title: Create da Mansão
description: Automation and engineering-focused modpack built around the Create mod, allowing players to design creative machines, efficient factories, and advanced mechanical systems, with quality-of-life and performance mods.
body:
Create: Engineering & Automation is a modpack focused on machine building, automation, and creativity. With Create as its core mod, players can design advanced mechanical systems using gears, belts, shafts, and interactive components in an intuitive and visually impressive way.

The modpack is designed to encourage experimentation and natural progression, allowing players to automate resources, build efficient factories, and explore creative solutions to in-game challenges. Quality-of-life, exploration, and performance mods ensure a balanced, stable, and enjoyable experience.

Perfect for players who enjoy engineering, automation, and creative freedom, whether in singleplayer or multiplayer.
